ogTitle: Jacana vs Jackass Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Jacana vs Jackass Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jacana, Victoria and Jackass Flat, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jackass Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Jacana (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jacana or Jackass Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jacana has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Jackass Flat scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jacana scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Jackass Flat scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jacana or Jackass Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jackass Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
